text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has been struggling from
exhaustion, so I bring her to the infirmary to get
some rest.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get me some good ol' shut-eye. Nnh...
Sooo sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What in tarnation?! Where am I?! Wait... Aren't
those the Three Goddesses?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's a real pleasure to meet y'all! Would ya
mind if I got a hug?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aw, no need to be bashful! Don't y'all just have
the cutest little faces?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's all be good friends! How 'bout joinin' me for
a party tonight?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses appear to smile upon
hearing Taiki's words. At that moment, a bright
light floods the room.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, where did those Three Goddesses get off to?
I was just huggin' them, and then...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's a darn shame. It was such a good dream,
too. But maybe this means something real lucky is
fixin' to happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back to her cheery self, Taiki Shuttle leaves the
infirmary with a spring in her step—perhaps the
work of the Three Goddesses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki's voice doesn't seem to reach the ears of the
Three Goddesses, and they depart. At that
moment, a bright light floods the room.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was tryin' to hug some folks in my dream, but
they up and vanished on me! Just like magic!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Think I can meet 'em again if I go back to sleep? Let me just shut my eyes for a spell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's excitement continues unabated for
quite a while. Unable to fall asleep, she doesn't
get the rest she needs.
